1062.issue: [E1062] js-controller dependency missing. js-controller 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please add to dependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/io-package.json).

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/io-package.json).

1126.issue: [W1126] [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "info.event" common.role is mandatory and must be a non-empty string

1144.issue: [E1144] Untranslated "common.news" entries detected (identical to English text): es(1.1.0).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.2.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3021.issue: [S3021] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3045.issue: [S3045] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" should enable linting by setting "lint: true" for "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v1".

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for "check-and-lint" job in [run #402](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/actions/runs/21229094161).

3052.issue: [W3052] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for job "adapter-tests (24.x, windows-latest)" in [run #402](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/actions/runs/21229094161).

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/client.js, [main.js](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/main.js)). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src/src/serviceWorker.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/io-package.json).

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "jsonwebtoken" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#306] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/issues/306)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=18" allows Node.js 18.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=20" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/package.json).

0037.issue: [W0037] @iobroker/adapter-dev 1.4.0 specified. 1.5.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/package.json)
